response.global_analysis: The video contains a vocal performance of the song '薔薇獄乙女' (Baragoku Otome) by ALI PROJECT, followed by a dialogue-heavy interaction scene. The audio phonetically matches the song title provided in the JSON, but the clip starts with the chorus rather than the first verse provided in the reference lyrics; I have discarded the mismatched reference text and transcribed the actual sung lyrics. I have prioritized vocal audio for precise timing, using on-screen text as a guide for titles and loading status.

subtitles.english: Blooming in crimson, a rose hell
The moon of this fleeting world is a night of turmoil

subtitles.original: これが恋でも 裏切りでも
subtitles.english: Even if this is love, or betrayal
Our corpses will be the same

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 絶えに絶え尽くしたモノから
subtitles.english: Ah, from things that have completely ceased to exist
I add color on top of that

subtitles.original: 逃げてるのか 追ってるのか
subtitles.english: Are you running away, or chasing?
Until you can no longer tell

subtitles.original: 私を見て もっと捕らえて
subtitles.english: Look at me, capture me more

subtitles.original: 燃えて紅蓮 薔薇地獄
生きたいのか 墜ちたいのか
subtitles.english: Do you want to live, or to fall?

subtitles.original: これが愛で 苦しみならば
subtitles.english: If this is love and suffering

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 奪いとって その心
檻に変わりゆく わたしの
subtitles.english: It's turning into a cage, my...

subtitles.original: 身体の中 閉じ込める
Thank you, thank you, thank you, thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you, thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: My, that was me and my sho- ballet performance.
subtitles.english: My, that was me and my short ballet performance.

subtitles.original: So, Otomo, what did you learn?
subtitles.english: So, Otomo, what did you learn?

subtitles.original: Because when I get into new things, I get like really obsessed with them...
subtitles.english: Because when I get into new things, I get like really obsessed with them...

subtitles.original: ...and it's really a lot of fun.
subtitles.english: ...and it's really a lot of fun.

subtitles.original: Oh, what's with your facial expression?
subtitles.english: Oh, what's with your facial expression?

subtitles.original: Hey, hey, hey! Stop, stop, stop! Not again!
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey! Stop, stop, stop! Not again!

subtitles.original: I got this. I can protect you.
subtitles.english: I got this. I can protect you.

subtitles.original: Because this is what we're fighting for!
subtitles.english: Because this is what we're fighting for!

subtitles.original: This is what justice is for!
subtitles.english: This is what justice is for!

subtitles.original: Wait, wait! No, you should come with me!
subtitles.english: Wait, wait! No, you should come with me!

subtitles.original: Come on, let's run, let's run!
subtitles.english: Come on, let's run, let's run!

subtitles.original: Oh, oh, you... you don't want to?
subtitles.english: Oh, oh, you... you don't want to?

subtitles.original: Can't come with me? It's okay.
subtitles.english: Can't come with me? It's okay.

subtitles.original: I might not be able to help this Otomo...
subtitles.english: I might not be able to help this Otomo...

subtitles.original: Haya! Come on, come on, come on, come on!
subtitles.english: Haya! Come on, come on, come on, come on!

subtitles.original: Oh no, you're limping. Come on!
subtitles.english: Oh no, you're limping. Come on!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, it's an idol stage!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, it's an idol stage!
